meta.title: ISQ Brasil — Engineering, Inspection and Certification
meta.description: Engineering that upholds industrial trust. Over 50 years of inspection, testing, certification and R&D.

manifesto.signature: For 50 years, ISQ has lived in that detail.

pillars.intro: We act on your behalf to promote the quality of your products, services, facilities and processes — bringing recognition, competitiveness and innovation to your operation.

marketAccess.title: Market access
marketAccess.description: Internationally recognized certifications open doors, qualify suppliers and unlock the tenders that matter.

licenseToOperate.title: License to operate
licenseToOperate.description: Regulatory, environmental and technical compliance so you can sustain operations without surprises or downtime.

safety.title: Safety and reliability
safety.description: Non-destructive testing and continuous inspection cut failure risk on critical assets — before it becomes a shutdown.

costControl.title: Cost control
costControl.description: Catching a problem early costs a fraction of fixing it late. Inspection is operating margin.

innovation.title: Accelerated innovation
innovation.description: R&D, product testing and technical prototyping shorten the cycle from idea to validation to market.

reputation.title: Brand reputation
reputation.description: Recognized seals make sure your delivery is trusted before it is even tested — by client, regulator and market.

footer.address: Rua Estados Unidos, 22 — Sion, Belo Horizonte/MG — 30315-270
